utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all of these five items. Each item is fully detailed with costs and coverage information: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with costs and details; (2) property_coverage includes home/contents coverage with costs; (3) travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; (4) additional_services includes enhancement services with costs (even if 0) and notes; (5) total_budget includes a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 requested items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four specific insurance items: (1) physical health plan 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage5', (2) mental health plan 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage1', (3) property coverage 'EliteHome Premium Coverage', and (4) travel coverage 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan'. The ground-truth ratings list does not have 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage5' or 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage1', but has 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' and 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' respectively. These appear to be naming variants with similar cost profiles, so they should map to those entries. Based on the ground truth: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (physical health) has rating 8, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (mental health) has rating 8, 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (property) has rating 10, and 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' (travel) has rating 10.
